content: But then, my problem is I can't sustain the turns. 1 cost shield cards are too small and bosses will one hit me
who do i choose?
Coinflip between Castor and Gdoll if you ask me. Depends on factions that you prefer I guess. Castor is probably a bit stronger, but Doll might be really hard to get later since she is a genesis unit

Doesn't look bad in theory. Caecus can heal a bit consistently. 1st turn you just tank a hit while buffing up, 2nd turn you put shield, 3rd turn you have exalts and some tent damage hopefully to do the damage (and GM exalt will give another shield). For longer fights you have GM's exalt, Corpo's exalt and white stance to cycle for shields. To cycle Corpo's lightning faster ppl add Aurita and Casiah, so your lineup will have less frequent lightnings than that one, but it should not be less durable thanks to Caecus and GM

Thanks, I just watched a few vids and realized people run corp with aurita and cassiah to discard faster. Then, do you think it is a good idea to split Tulu and GMurphy to another comp, say, Tulu/GM/Myriam/Flex? Because I feel like with the current comp, I don't usually have mana to cast GM Waltz, unless I'm playing the comp wrong here.

Tulu feels like he works way better with Corpo, all his cards have aftershock even without being played and it gets even better with Rouse. GM/Myriam/Goliath+1 is a more standard one from what I see on d-dive charts, Tulu is almost always with Corpo

Very…
for GM lineup you probably want to cast Waltz as a 1st thing each time, tent damage translates into everything to her teams. Can get posse for extra arith if there is not enough, or use her 0 cost
So many terms
I think GM wants a team built about her, like myriam/Thais or so, those who can battery her and let her Waltz. Unless I'm understanding things wrong here
So probably not corpo. Her discards will clutter the hand too much with her lightnings, lowering the chance for her Waltz to appear

well, I'd say it is more accurate to say that she herself is built on tentacle damage and she boosts it heavily. So other units that can contribute or benefit from tentacle damage. Corpo technically would fit but she boost tentacles through discards, while Lemurians that are used with GM have little synergy with discards (that's why Tulu ends up with Corpo even though he is a Lemurian too)
Right... When I run GM and corpo together, I always find them fighting for priority. Either choose to scale corpo and make GM a support, or vice versa, it's so hard to do both
Unless there is a way to cast GM 0 cost every time I see it, without worrying about dying
Maybe that can be done, I see people can scale up shields to safe level literally every turn T_T

if you struggle with survival add a Caro unit lol. losing 50% dmg amplification is not that scary cause you gonna have a lot already. Thais to clone GM's 3 cost cards is a very solid pick if you are not doing D-dive
Me after playing 24 days still figuring out new stuff daily 😭😭😭

No damage dealers. I guess the idea is to survive and do counter damage, but there won't be enough healing at higher levels. You have Cath on 3rd ascension, that will probably be easiest team to use. The good thing about her is she can probably work with anyone. So Cathi, Ramona to generate Arith, Nautila for now cause she is built and 4th can be another faction you like. Castor will be good for shields and damage boost, Aigis for free heals and petrify, Caecus or Celeste for heals and tentacle stances

This is why jenkin is good btw she gives team wide crits
If a character mentions a stat in their traits they uniquely benefit from their own stats. It's on a unit to unit basis.
Normally death resistance is just teamwide but she gets stronger emotions based off her death resistance.

It's a bit of a meme. But basically when you get all of the standard units you need, you should just roll wheels.

Hii, i wanted to start doing D-tide so wanted to see if these teams look good for it?, im still leveling them up<:scared2:1356085635374383145>

Castor Team:
Upgrade Castor “Strike”, Clem and Pollux “Exalts”. Give Pollux “Dearest Friend” instead of “Analysis of Death”. Give Castor a Purple DMG Amp WoD. 

Corpo Team: 
Change Posse to “Encounter in Pure White”. Level Aurita to 50. Level everyone’s important Command Cards to Lvl 3-4, including Exalt. Give Aurita a different Purple Crit Rate(or a WoD that gives Crit Rate Passive)WoD that doesn’t put a “Strike” in deck for no reason, and give her “Crimsum Pulse” CoV. Casiah can run any supports CoV(Re-Evolution/Burial Grounds). Corposant can run “Dreams of Medicine” w/ any WoDs that increase her Dmg Output.

Fauxborn Team;
Run “Mouse” or “Festival of Tides” Posse. For Fauxborn, run “Dreams of Medicine” w/ her own Sig, and a Purple Crit Dmg/Crit Rate WoDs. Make Faros hold “Life Drain” w/ Keyflare WoDs. Goliath should go “Burial Grounds” with Dmg Amp or Death Res WoDs. Upgrade Goliath and Tulu Exalt. Tulu is fine.

Kath:
Tinct wants Sigil Yield WoDs, and her CoV can be “Burial Grounds”.

Soulforges should be:
A1: 1
A2: 1-3
A3: 4-6
A4: 7-10
A5: 10
Prioritize Main Dps Soulforges. Supports Soulforges can be a few levels under Main Dps.

Those teams will be fine, generally. Swaps will be necessary for survival depending on the Wave/Bosses, *sometimes*.

Are you talking about the “Ring” that changes every cycle? Yes it does matter. Some Potraits are useless while others make Awakeners usuable, and other Potraits absolutely break a unit. The Ring gives all Awakeners of that Realm their Potraits at the beginning of a “run”, a different Realm/Ring each D-Tide cycle.
Certain teams work better into certain bosses, so you won’t be always running Castor into W4, *unless* that team is your strongest team by far.
For Relics cycling, they make a specific status/archetype better, but doesn’t mean you *have* to run Poison/Counter/STR Stacking/Tentacles.
It certainly helps with that status/archetype thou

is it like poison
It's potential extra damage that can be cashed in by units other than castor attacking the target with active attacks
for every damage your ally does it deducts 1 stack and does 3 dmg directly to enemy hp lol
ohh so castor is a dps supporter
yep, even at low merges he is really good. just need to get used to creating plumes but it will be easy with your merges
so that's basically x3 damage(for as much corrosion you have at least)
Noticeable for Ultra since Ultra Round is weakened by 25% (dmg, healing, Aliemus regen, Keyflare, and such)
x4. and it bypasses shileds and barriers cause it is direct hp removal
Keep in mind corrosion doesn't stay after end of turn so you need to use it up immediately after applying it
